title: Pet Munchies Chicken with Carrot Sticks Dog Treats, Healthy Dental Chews with Natural Real Meat, Low in Fat 80g
features: 100% NATURAL, PREMIUM REAL CHICKEN: This super quality gourmet treat is made with 100% natural, human-grade chicken breast blended with carrot

FULL OF NATURAL GOODNESS & LOW IN FAT: A rich source of vitamins and minerals such as potassium and antioxidant Beta-Carotene, this treat is low in fat with no artificial colours or flavours, making this the perfect healthy chew for you four legged friend!
FOR HEALTHY TEETH AND GUMS: Our premium dental sticks are designed to satisfy your dog's natural instinct to chew to help reduce tartar and plaque, supporting good oral health for your dogs

SUITABLE FOR ALL BREEDS & SIZES: Our chicken with carrot sticks are suitable for all breeds of dogs and puppies over 4 months - please remember that these treats should make up a small part of your pet's balanced diet

SEALED WITH A DOG'S APPROVAL: Pet Munchies is a UK based company dedicated to creating premium, gourmet treats that are made with high quality, human grade meat. Our treats are delicious, nutritious and wholesome, with all the meaty flavours dogs love delicately toasted to perfection!
description: Product Description Pet Munchies: Sealed with a dog’s approval Pet Munchies is a multi-award-winning range of premium, gourmet treats made with high quality, natural human grade meat and fish. The treats provide natural textures, flavours and exceptional palatability that dogs and cats love. Our Story It started with our founder’s Flat Coated Retriever having problems when eating treats and causing allergies. After trying all the available alternatives, we tried everything but still he had problems caused by the ingredients commonly found in treats – so we set out to create something better– and the Pet Munchies Brand was born. Our commitment to you We are committed to sourcing the finest ingredients and ensuring all our treats are made with 100% natural human grade meat, that are full of flavour, including grain and gluten free varieties. Your four-legged best friend deserve a life without boundaries. Where they can walk, run, climb, jump, and play to their heart’s content. And we do our utmost to help you give it to them. Indications General Ingredients Chicken 52.8%, Soy Protein, Vegetable Starch, Wheat Flour, Glycerin, Dry Carrot, Dry Spinach, Sorbitol, Red Oxide E172 (EC PERMITTED NATURAL COLOUR), Crude Protein 30.0%, Crude Fats 1.0%, Crude Fibre 1.0%, Crude Ash 3.0%, Moisture 18.0% Directions Store in a cool dry place out of reach of children and pets. Re-seal pack after use. Box Contains Pet Munchies Chicken and Carrot Sticks 8x80gm See more
